message:
feat: add bd sql command for raw SQL access to database (bd-x67d1)

Adds a new `bd sql` subcommand that passes raw SQL queries directly to
the underlying database (SQLite or Dolt). Supports table, JSON, and CSV
output for SELECT queries, and reports rows affected for write queries.
Write queries are blocked in read-only mode via CheckReadonly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
